issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' not 'EndOfBattle' — text states 'during this battle'
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and opponent Character target is completely unsupported by card text. Card only returns UP TO 1 of YOUR Characters, not opponent's. This effect should be removed.
Card text describes single sequential action chain (PowerBoost THEN ReturnToHand). Should be single effect object with two actions in sequence, not two separate effects.
